chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-396 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 01.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Manzoor Hussain Halepoto, Advocate for respondent/ Town Committee Kotdiji Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wasan, Assistant Advocate General ************** Counsel for respondents No.2to4 has filed a statement along with three cheques, totaling Rs.4,26,583/-, and a PS copy of the audit bill. Counsel for respondents/Town Committee Kotdiji submits that the entire payment has been made to the petitioner and no outstanding amount remains. Let the original cheques be kept in the safe custody of the Additional Registrar of this Court and handed over to the petitioner upon proper verification and identification, as per rules. Since the entire payment has been made to the petitioner and no outstanding amount remains, the present Constitution Petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
